
	




<b>Application</b>
 Register is not allowed if protagonist's level is between 1-69 
 Join Grand Line matches if protagonist's level between 70-110 
 Join New World matches if protagonist's level is over 110(not including lv.110)

  {0}={1}

 After the event, 10 cheerers will be chosen as lucky players and be awarded with twice as much as the cheering silvers. Participants who are not on the winners rank will get 5 Lv.1 Shell Chests;

 All participants need to pay 100,000 silvers as registration fee

<b>Rules and silver cheers</b>
 The best of three games system will be adopted for Top 32 and following matches. Each round of match lasts 30 minutes with 10 minutes intervals. You can adjust crews and formations during the interval, and click 'Save Info' button to save the settings;

 During the first 10 minutes of a match, if your protagonist's level is above lv.50, you can click top32 players' name to cheer. Each cheer costs 1 million silvers. One player has 10 cheers during the whole battles. Top 32 players cannot chee;

 If the player you cheer for wins one match, you'll get 50% cheer fees as a reward and lose 50% cheer fees if the player lost. You can open My Cheers to check relevant information and get your reward after the event;

 Preliminary 13:00-15:00
 Top 32 15:00-15:30 
 Top 16 15:30-16:00 
 Top 8 16:00-16:30 
 Top 4 16:30-17:00 
 Final   17:00-17:30

 Rewards must be claimed within 3 days at the cross-server interface.

************************************

2. When progress is higher than 60, you can enhance warship. Success rate increases as progress increases;

3. When progress is higher than 90, there's a chance to get critical hit. Critical hit will definitely appear when enhancement level+2 and progress is 100;

4. When enhancement level reaches lv.100, Enhancement Rank+1, and you'll get Anti-Cri Hit as a bonus;

5. When progress is over 100, system will deduct 100 points. Warship's enhancement level cannot higher than warship remodel level.
